title: Interpret Process Status Indicators On The VISU_DATA Screen
summary: Use the Process Status section on the VISU_DATA screen to determine the current documented operating and tote-handling state of the tipper based on the source-defined indicator meanings.
when_to_use: Use this reference when viewing the Operator Station HMI VISU_DATA screen and needing to interpret the documented meaning of the Process Status indicators: In Cycle, Tipper Ready, AGV Present, Tote RFID Pass, Tip in Process, Tipper Clear, and Tipper Faulted.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to infer meanings for colors or states not described in the source.
Do not use this runbook as a fault recovery or control procedure.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the VISU_DATA screen and interpret Process Status indicators using the documented meanings from the source.

safety_notes: This is a reference procedure for HMI interpretation only.
Do not infer meanings for colors or states not described in the source.
Escalate if an observed indicator state does not match the documented labels or expected green-state meaning.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: The VISU_DATA screen is available for viewing on the Operator Station HMI.
external_references: OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual, section 4.1.2.2 VISU_DATA SCREEN

visual_references.description: Operator Station HMI VISU_DATA screen reference for locating the screen layout and Process Status area.
Operator station display controls showing how to navigate to the VISU_DATA screen.

steps.title: Open the VISU_DATA screen and locate Process Status
steps.purpose: Position the operator on the correct HMI screen before interpreting status indicators.
steps.instruction: Open the VISU_DATA screen on the Operator Station HMI and locate the Process Status section.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_DATA screen is visible and the Process Status section can be identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can see the VISU_DATA screen and identify the labeled Process Status area.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_DATA screen or Process Status section cannot be located.

actions.label: Open VISU_DATA
actions.exact_action: Open the VISU_DATA screen and locate the Process Status section.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_DATA screen layout and the Process Status section.
Display controls and screen navigation reference for accessing VISU_DATA.

stop_or_escalate_if: The VISU_DATA screen cannot be accessed.
The Process Status section is not visible or does not match the documented screen layout.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 4-20 and Table 4-6 describe the Operator Station HMI Data Screen, including Process Status.
F5 maps to Visu_Data and the display controls can be used to navigate between HMI screens.

steps.title: Interpret In Cycle
steps.purpose: Determine whether the tipper is documented as operating in Auto mode.
steps.instruction: Observe whether the In Cycle indicator is green and interpret green as the tipper operating in Auto mode.
steps.expected_result: The operator understands whether the In Cycle indicator shows the documented green-state condition.
steps.healthy_condition: If In Cycle is green, the tipper is operating in Auto mode.
steps.failure_condition: The indicator state cannot be interpreted from the documented source or appears inconsistent with the documented meaning.

actions.label: Check In Cycle
actions.exact_action: Observe whether the In Cycle indicator is green and interpret green as the tipper operating in Auto mode.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Process Status section and the In Cycle indicator.

stop_or_escalate_if: The In Cycle indicator label does not match the documented label.
The observed state does not align with the documented green-state meaning.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Process Status includes In Cycle. The source documents green-state meanings for several indicators.

steps.instruction: Observe whether the Tipper Ready indicator is green and interpret green as the tipper being ready to receive a tote.

steps.healthy_condition: If Tipper Ready is green, the tipper is ready to receive a tote.
steps.failure_condition: The indicator state cannot be interpreted from the documented source or appears inconsistent with the documented meaning.

actions.label: Check Tipper Ready
actions.exact_action: Observe whether the Tipper Ready indicator is green and interpret green as the tipper being ready to receive a tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Process Status section and the Tipper Ready indicator.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Tipper Ready indicator label does not match the documented label.
The observed state does not align with the documented green-state meaning.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Process Status includes Tipper Ready. The source documents green-state meanings for several indicators.

steps.title: Interpret AGV Present
steps.purpose: Determine whether a robot is documented as currently stationed at the tipper.
steps.instruction: Observe whether the AGV Present indicator is green and interpret green as a robot currently stationed at the tipper.
steps.expected_result: The operator understands whether the AGV Present indicator shows the documented green-state condition.
steps.healthy_condition: If AGV Present is green, a robot is currently stationed at the tipper.
steps.failure_condition: The indicator state cannot be interpreted from the documented source or appears inconsistent with the documented meaning.

actions.exact_action: Observe whether the AGV Present indicator is green and interpret green as a robot currently stationed at the tipper.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV Present indicator label does not match the documented label.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Process Status includes AGV Present. The source documents green-state meanings for several indicators.

steps.title: Interpret Tote RFID Pass
steps.purpose: Capture the documented status of the Tote RFID Pass indicator without inferring active use.
steps.instruction: Note the Tote RFID Pass indicator and record that the source states it is not used currently.
steps.expected_result: The operator understands that Tote RFID Pass is documented as not currently used.
steps.healthy_condition: The indicator is treated only as a documented unused item.
steps.failure_condition: The operator attempts to assign an unsupported operational meaning to Tote RFID Pass.

actions.label: Note Tote RFID Pass
actions.exact_action: Note the Tote RFID Pass indicator and record that the source states it is not used currently.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Process Status section and the Tote RFID Pass indicator.

stop_or_escalate_if: A user attempts to interpret Tote RFID Pass beyond the source statement that it is not used currently.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Process Status includes Tote RFID Pass. The candidate evidence states the source says it is not used currently.

steps.title: Interpret Tip in Process
steps.purpose: Determine whether the gripper has taken hold of a tote and remains active until release.
steps.instruction: Observe whether the Tip in Process indicator is green and interpret green as the gripper having taken hold of a tote and remaining active until the tote is released.
steps.expected_result: The operator understands whether the Tip in Process indicator shows the documented green-state condition.
steps.healthy_condition: If Tip in Process is green, the gripper has taken hold of a tote and remains active until the tote is released.
steps.failure_condition: The indicator state cannot be interpreted from the documented source or appears inconsistent with the documented meaning.

actions.label: Check Tip in Process
actions.exact_action: Observe whether the Tip in Process indicator is green and interpret green as the gripper having taken hold of a tote and remaining active until the tote is released.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Process Status section and the Tip in Process indicator.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Tip in Process indicator label does not match the documented label.
The observed state does not align with the documented green-state meaning.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Process Status includes Tip in Process. The source documents green-state meanings for several indicators.

success_criteria: The user can determine the documented meaning of each Process Status indicator shown on the VISU_DATA screen.
Each listed Process Status indicator is interpreted only according to the source-supported meaning.
healthy_conditions: The VISU_DATA screen is accessible and the Process Status section is visible.
Indicators are interpreted only where the source provides documented meaning.
Green-state meanings are applied only to the indicators described by the source.
failure_conditions: An observed indicator state does not match the documented labels or expected green-state meaning.
The operator cannot locate the VISU_DATA screen or Process Status section.
A user infers meanings for colors or states not described in the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if an observed indicator state does not match the documented labels or expected green-state meaning.
Escalate if the VISU_DATA screen layout or indicator labels differ from the documented source.
Do not infer meanings for colors or states not described in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_DATA screen and Process Status section.
Navigation controls used to access the VISU_DATA screen.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Process Status includes In Cycle, Tipper Ready, AGV Present, Tote RFID Pass, Tip in Process, Tipper Clear, and Tipper Faulted. Several indicators are documented as green when their condition is true.

missing_details: The packet does not provide the full verbatim Table 4-6 text for each individual indicator definition.
The source packet supports green-state meanings but does not provide supported meanings for non-green states.
No time estimate is provided in the source packet.
No explicit production stop or LOTO requirement is stated in the source packet.
